config.title: Pit 5 - strona 3 #ifdef _DEBUG [THIS_FILE] #endif
config.script:
<% 'funkcje pomocne przy ukladaniu napisów - do deklaracji #include "50514"
%>

body.p:
PT5_KWOTA(48,root_.pt5_curSkladkaUbezZdr) PT5_KWOTA(49,root_.pt5_curUlgiInwest) PT5_KWOTA(50,root_.pt5_curUlgiSzkola) PT5_KWOTA(52,root_.pt5_curInneOdliczeniaOdPodatku) PT5_KWOTA(53,root_.pt5_curPodatekPoOdl_PoczRoku) PT5_KWOTA(54,root_.pt5_curSumaNalZal_PopMies) PT5_KWOTA(55,root_.pt5_curNalZal_ZaMies) PT5_KWOTA(56,root_.pt5_curSumaNalZal_PoczRoku)
PT5_KWOTA(59,root_.pt5_curKwotaDecyzjaOrgPod) PT5_KWOTA(60,root_.pt5_curKwotaZreal_PopMies) PT5_KWOTA(61,root_.pt5_curKwotaDoZrealBiezDeklaracja) PT5_KWOTA(62,root_.pt5_curZalPoOgr) PT5_KWOTA(63,root_.pt5_curPodDochOdDochRemLikw) PT5_KWOTA(64,root_.pt5_curKwotaDoZapl) PT5_KWOTA(65,root_.pt5_curOdsetki)
<%
dim nLen:nLen = 50 dim nRows:nRows = 5 dim strLine:strLine = "" dim text:text = root_.pt5_strRodzajOdliczen
dim iter for iter = 0 to nRows - 1 strLine = left(text,nLen) if (len(text) - nLen) < 0 then nLen = len(text) end if text = right(text , len(text) - nLen) so.write " " + strLine + "" next
%>
<%
dim nLen2:nLen2 = 40 dim nRows2:nRows2 = 4 dim strLine2:strLine2 = "" dim text2:text2 = root_.pt5_strNumery
dim iter2 for iter2 = 0 to nRows2 - 1 strLine2 = left(text2,nLen2) if (len(text2) - nLen2) < 0 then nLen2 = len(text2) end if text2 = right(text2 , len(text2) - nLen2) so.write " " + strLine2 + "" next
%>
<%
dim nLen3:nLen3 = 40 dim nRows3:nRows3 = 4 dim strLine3:strLine3 = "" dim text3:text3 = root_.pt5_strDaty
dim iter3 for iter3 = 0 to nRows3 - 1 strLine3 = left(text3,nLen3) if (len(text3) - nLen3) < 0 then nLen3 = len(text3) end if text3 = right(text3 , len(text3) - nLen3) so.write " " + strLine3 + "" next
%>
WTPFXY(66A,StretchDoKratki(root_.pt5_strNIP1),PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(67A,StretchDoKratki(left(replace(root_.pt5_strRegon1," ",""),5)),PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(67B,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5_strRegon1," ",""),6,5)),PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(67C,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5_strRegon1," ",""),11,4)),PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(68,root_.pt5_strNazwa1,PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) <% if len(root_.pt5_strMiejsce1) > 30 then %> WTPFXY(69,root_.pt5_strMiejsce1,4) <% else %> WTPFXY(69,root_.pt5_strMiejsce1,PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) <% end if %>
PT5_KWOTA(70,root_.pt5_curUdzial1) PT5_KWOTA(71,root_.pt5_curPrzychod1) PT5_KWOTA(72,root_.pt5_curKoszty1) PT5_KWOTA(73,root_.pt5_curDochod1) PT5_KWOTA(74,root_.pt5_curStrata1)
WTPFXY(75A,StretchDoKratki(root_.pt5_strNIP2),PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(76A,StretchDoKratki(left(replace(root_.pt5_strRegon2," ",""),5)),PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(76B,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5_strRegon2," ",""),6,5)),PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(76C,StretchDoKratki(mid(replace(root_.pt5_strRegon2," ",""),11,4)),PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(77,root_.pt5_strNazwa2,PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC) WTPFXY(78,root_.pt5_strMiejsce2,PT5_FONT_WYSOKOSC)
PT5_KWOTA(79,root_.pt5_curUdzial2) PT5_KWOTA(80,root_.pt5_curPrzychod2) PT5_KWOTA(81,root_.pt5_curKoszty2) PT5_KWOTA(82,root_.pt5_curDochod2) PT5_KWOTA(83,root_.pt5_curStrata2)
DEMO_MARKER(4000,11000)
